violations.description: EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): Observed employee coffee travel cup being stored on cutting board of prep top cooler in the main establishment kitchen.

STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Cleaned and sanitized utensils noted being stored in such a way that the food or lip contact surfaces were being contaminated in the Subway prep kitchen. The bins storing lids and utensils have debris build up on bottom.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in walk-in freezer. Observed cases of food items stored on floor in the Subway walk-in freezer.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service noted being stored in an unapproved location. Observed single use items stored under the front handwash lavatory in the Subway area.
